title: FTS database disk image is malformed for UTF-16 encoding and integrity check
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE vt1 (c0 String, c1 Nullable(Int32), c2 Nullable(Float64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO vt1(c0, c1) VALUES('test', NULL);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c1 IS NULL OR (c2 > 0.0);
key_bug_features: Integrity check fails with UTF-16 encoded FTS database
